features.notes: package.ts defines chemblSubstructureSearchPanel, chemblSubstructureSearch, and the shared chemblSearchWidgetLocalDb. cartridge.ts smoke-tests patternSubstructureSearch.
package.ts defines chemblSimilaritySearchPanel, chemblSimilaritySearch (canonicalises via Chem:getRdKitModule then calls patternSimilaritySearch). cartridge.ts covers both similarity queries.
Only the chemblIdToSmilesTs converter wrapper lives in TS (package.ts); the rest is SQL in queries/converters.sql. converters.ts holds golden values for every converter query.

Bioactivity logic lives entirely in SQL (activityDetailsForTarget.sql, bioactivityForBacterialTargets.sql, queries.sql). The only TS surface is getChemblCompoundsByOrganism in package.ts which calls StructuresByOrganism.

chemblSearchWidgetLocalDb plus the two info-panel wrappers are defined in package.ts. The MolregnoInfo / ChemblInfo / ByChemblIds / _cbFindByMolregno panels are SQL-registered via --tags: panel,widget.
package.ts registers the Database Queries demo function; demo.ts builds the two-tab demo view that re-runs FracClassificationWithSubstructure on input change.

All three hitTriage* functions (getChemblCompoundsByOrganism, getChemblCompounds, chemblMolregno) are decorated in package.ts; they delegate to SQL queries StructuresByOrganism / ChemblNumberOfStructures / ChemblMolregNoBySmiles.
Pure SQL feature (FracClassification, FracClassificationWithSubstructure in queries). demo.ts is the only TS file that exercises it as the seed query for the Database Queries demo.
Pure SQL feature implemented in queries/pkData.sql + pkData.layout; no TS surface.
Pure SQL feature in queries/queries.sql (_protein classification); no TS surface.
package.ts.init calls registerChemblIdHandler (handlers.ts) which boots a DBExplorer from explorer-config.ts and attaches a SMILES molecule renderer.
Pure SQL feature (queries/suggestions.sql); no TS surface.
